programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Compañeros
programme.desc: Mientras Danny y Maria escoltan drogas confiscadas, su convoy es atacado y Baez resulta herida. Danny busca al cartel responsable. Frank debe navegar lo personal y lo político.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Puentes ardientes
programme.desc: Danny y Baez tienen nuevos compañeros temporales. Jamie y Eddie planean robar la placa de un detective. Frank habla sobre igualdad y compromete su relación con la Arquidiócesis.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Oregon es encontrada muerta en un asilo, la UAC se da cuenta que la víctima es parte de una serie de asesinatos rituales góticos y que el asesino podría ser satanista.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La hermana de Morgan ve a una muchacha que se parece a su prima supuestamente muerta. Morgan tiene que confesar a su familia la mentira que él dijo, y el UAC vuelve a abrir el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de un asesino en serie es ejecutado en Oklahoma, un imitador aparece y los agentes del FBI son llamados para encontrarlo. Al mismo tiempo, Prentiss se pone nerviosa pensando en una importante compra inmobiliaria.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC presenta uno de los casos más longevos de un asesino en serie a unos estudiantes universitarios, y llevan la clase a través de los 20 años en los que persiguieron al asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un controvertido DJ y un oficial de la Marina son asesinados a tiros, el equipo descubre un siniestro plan.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Adentrándose en la mente de una brillante científica naval, Abby se obsesiona con resolver su asesinato, mientras que la última aventura de DiNozzo conduce a un interesante Halloween.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El padre de Dinozzo regresa, desempeñando un papel vital en la investigación de un asesinato que podría tener resultados catastróficos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo es asignado para proteger al padre de Ziva, cuando su asistencia a una conferencia de NCIS conduce a algunas sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Puentes ardientes
programme.desc: Danny y Baez tienen nuevos compañeros temporales. Jamie y Eddie planean robar la placa de un detective. Frank habla sobre igualdad y compromete su relación con la Arquidiócesis.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Perdonar y olvidar
programme.desc: Jamie defiende a un oficial acosado por testificar contra su pareja. Erin descubre que su amante podría ser su jefe en la fiscalía. Danny pide a Erin que acuse de asesinato a un hombre que disparó a una niña de 15 años que murió 8 años después.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Fuerza excesiva
programme.desc: Frank debe decidir si defiende a su hijo Danny, acusado de usar fuerza excesiva, o la reputación de la policía. Jamie se conecta con una doctora después de llevar a un indigente al hospital.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Habladora
programme.desc: Jamie es atacado por un matón vengativo después de intervenir en su relación abusiva con su novia. Frank enfrenta un escándalo político por comentarios insensibles de Henry que fueron grabados ilegalmente y filtrados a la prensa.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Volando Alto

programme.title: El camino del oeste
programme.desc: Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum y Richard Widmark protagonizan esta suntuosa historia de los hombres y mujeres que dejaron la comodidad y seguridad de sus vidas por la promesa de una tierra libre y una vida mejor en el indómito Oeste.

programme.title: Los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Hombres armados son contratados para proteger un pueblo mexicano de un grupo de bandidos en esta adaptación de “Seven Samurai” de Kurosawa.

programme.title: El desafío de los siete magníficos
programme.desc: El jefe de 'Los Siete Magníficos' es ahora el sheriff de una pequeña ciudad. Cuando su 'tranquilidad' es destruida por el asesinato de su esposa, acepta una misión: rescatar a un grupo de mujeres de unos bandidos con la ayuda de cinco duros convictos.

programme.title: Justicia roja

programme.title: El gángster
programme.desc: En la Nueva York de la década de 1920, la comunidad negra de Harlem enfrenta las mismas indignidades que millones de refugiados. Tres líderes de grupos rivales (Laurence Fishhburne, Tim Roth y Andy García) luchan por controlar el poder urbano de Harlem.

programme.title: Sliver, una invasión a la intimidad
programme.desc: Cuando Carly se muda a uno de los edificios más exclusivos de Nueva York, los residentes empiezan a ser brutalmente asesinados. Y alguien está filmando a Carly en sus momentos más privados.

programme.title: Sin Rastro
programme.desc: Un hombre busca a su esposa desaparecida luego de que se rompe su coche en una ruta desierta.

programme.title: El escritor fantasma
programme.desc: El cineasta Roman Polanski eleva la tensión en este thriller sobre un escritor (Ewan McGregor) encargado de redactar las vivencias de un ex primer ministro (Pierce Brosnan).

programme.title: Lo que perdimos en el camino
programme.desc: Una viuda reciente invita al afligido mejor amigo de su marido a vivir con ella y a sus dos hijos. A medida que esto comienza a cambiar su vida, también ayuda a la familia a salir adelante y afrontar su pérdida.

programme.title: El sol de cada mañana
programme.desc: Un pronosticador del tiempo de Chicago (Cage), separado de su esposa y sus hijos, se cuestiona si el éxito profesional y el éxito personal se excluyen mutuamente.

programme.title: Al calor de la noche
programme.desc: Un policía afroamericano tiene que investigar el caso de un asesinato por motivos raciales en una hostil ciudad sureña.

programme.title: Escritores de la libertad
programme.desc: Hilary Swank protagoniza esta emocionante historia sobre chicos de barrio, que han crecido entre disparos y actitudes muy difíciles, y la maestra que les da lo que más necesitan: una voz propia.

programme.title: Rob Roy: la pasión de un rebelde
programme.desc: En la Escocia de 1713, Rob Roy MacGregor es agraviado por un noble y su sobrino, se convierte en un proscrito en busca de venganza mientras huye de los casacas rojas y se enfrenta a la acusación de ser jacobita.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate (LAS)

programme.title: Terremoto de San Andrés
programme.desc: Cuando una desacreditada sismóloga de Los Andeles advierte acerca de un inminente terremoto de 12.7, nadie la toma en serio. Sola, corre desesperadamente para poner a salvo a su familia antes de que el terremoto separe la ciudad del continente.

programme.title: Tipo duro
programme.desc: Un veterano de Vietnam que se convierte en un héroe local luego de salvar a un hombre de unos atacantes en un autobús, decide tomar acción cuando su mejor amigo es asesinado y la policía demuestra poco interés en resolver el crimen.

programme.title: El pago
programme.desc: Michael Jennings trabaja en proyectos ultrasecretos. Luego de cada trabajo, borran su memoria.

programme.title: Peligro inminente

programme.desc: Un criminal de carrera, capturado por las autoridades mexicanas, es enviado a una prisión de alta seguridad donde aprende a sobrevivir con la ayuda de un niño

programme.title: El pago
programme.desc: Michael Jennings trabaja en proyectos ultrasecretos. Luego de cada trabajo, borran su memoria.

programme.title: Askari

programme.title: Edhel

programme.title: El corcel negro
programme.desc: Un niño (Kelly Reno) y un semental árabe forman un vínculo duradero al naufragar en una isla. Cuando los rescatan, ellos se unen a un ex-jinete (Mickey Rooney), que los prepara para correr con los mejores caballos del mundo.

programme.title: El regreso del corcel negro
programme.desc: Negro' es un magnífico caballo de carreras famosas en el mundo entero; pero para su joven dueño americano, Alec Ramsay, es mucho más. Así que, cuando le roban el sensacional animal, Alec está dispuesto a hacer lo imposible por recuperarlo.

programme.title: Hotel para perros
programme.desc: Un adolescente huérfano que aloja en secreto a perros perdidos en un hotel abandonado. Basado en la novela de Lois Duncan.

programme.title: Max

programme.title: Un elefante llamado Vera

programme.title: Un pequeño gran problema

programme.title: Euroviaje
programme.desc: Europa nunca será la misma después de que Scotty Thomas y sus amigos aterrizan para vivir aventuras y excesos, haciendo las cosas más alocadas en el viaje más salvaje de sus vidas!

programme.desc: Barbra Streisand y Seth Rogen son el dúo cómico perfecto al embarcarse en un gran viaje. Cuando Andy invita a su madre a un viaje de 8 días y 4800 kilómetros por el país, cuanto más lejos viajan, más cercanos se vuelven.

programme.title: Viaje censurado
programme.desc: Cuatro amigos emprenden un viaje de 3000 kilómetros para recuperar un video ilícito enviado por error a una amiga.

programme.title: Euroviaje
programme.desc: Europa nunca será la misma después de que Scotty Thomas y sus amigos aterrizan para vivir aventuras y excesos, haciendo las cosas más alocadas en el viaje más salvaje de sus vidas!

programme.title: Viva
programme.desc: Jesus is a young hairdresser working at a Havana nightclub that showcases drag performers, who dreams of being a performer himself. But when his father has different expectations, the men struggle to understand one another and reconcile as a family.

programme.title: La nana
programme.desc: Raquel, una mujer agria y introvertida, lucha a capa y espada por mantener su puesto de 23 años como nana de la familia Valdez.

programme.desc: Restaurant owner Tere has fallen into a state of depression after the tragic death of her daughter. With her eatery facing crisis, granddaughter Maria steps in to help Tere rediscover her love of good food and save the business from disarray.

programme.title: La virgen de agosto (LAS)
programme.desc: Eva decide quedarse durante agosto en Madrid, todo un acto de fe, para poder ver y sentir las cosas de otra manera y encontrar nuevas oportunidades.

programme.title: El cuento de las comadrejas
programme.desc: Una actriz de la era dorada del cine argentino comparte una mansión en decadencia con tres hombres: su esposo, un guionista y un director con los que solía trabajar. Pero la llegada de dos jóvenes y la posible venta de la mansión lo cambian todo.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: El robo del siglo
programme.desc: Basada en hechos reales, un grupo de ladrones realizó el que se considera uno de los robos bancarios más famosos e inteligentes de la historia de Argentina al robar la sucursal del Banco Río en Acassuso.

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: Sueños de un asesino
programme.desc: La vida pacífica de la familia de Claire Cooper (Annette Bening) sufre un cambio terrorífico cuando un asesino serial (Robert Downey Jr.) invade su pueblo de Nueva Inglaterra... y acosa sus sueños con pistas de sus próximos movimientos mortales.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: Ruta 666
programme.desc: Route 666 is the thrilling story of a Federal agent whose pursuit of an escaped witness brings him directly in contact with a highway haunted by a treacherous past.

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Una chica se enfrenta cara a cara con un espíritu que, después de mucho tiempo de tormento, ha estado buscando su regreso.

programme.title: San Valentín sangriento (2009)
programme.desc: Una nueva versión de la clásica película de terror de 1981 de George Mihalka, San Valentín sangriento tiene lugar diez años después de un devastador accidente en una mina de carbón con una serie de horribles asesinatos que atormentan a una pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Tú eres el próximo
programme.desc: La reunión familiar de los Davis se tuerce cuando su casa es asediada por un equipo de asaltantes con máscaras y ballestas.

programme.title: Comes a Horseman
programme.desc: Set in the American West of the 1940s, a pair of little-guy ranchers join forces against the depredations of a ruthless land baron determined to expand his empire at whatever cost. Starring Jane Fonda, James Caan, and Jason Robards.

programme.title: Barbed Wire
programme.desc: In 1878, Gene Autry is a cattle buyer who tries to settle a battle between the cattlemen and homesteaders, when the latter are worked up into a feverish pitch by unscrupulous landowner Steve Rutledge.

programme.title: Apache Country
programme.desc: Cavalry scouts Gene Autry & Pat Buttram are ordered to break up a ring which uses raids to cover up its activities. Carolina Cotton assists Gene and Pat, while seeking revenge against the gang leader.

programme.title: War Of The Wildcats
programme.desc: A confident oil baron and a determined cowboy are rivals for Oklahoma land and oil rights, and for the love of a pretty schoolteacher. The cowboy acts on behalf of the Indians, on whose land the oil is discovered.

programme.title: Fort Massacre
programme.desc: Joel McCrea gives a compelling performance as a cavalry sergeant apparently leading his men to safety, but actually slowly going mad in an insane attempt to avenge an Indian massacre.

programme.title: Sam Whiskey
programme.desc: Welcome to America's Wild - and very wacky - West! Burt Reynolds, Clint Walker, Ossie Davis and Angie Dickinson star in this tongue-in-cheek tale of love, lust and larceny as an amiable con-artist is hire by a sexy widow to break into the U.S. Mint.

programme.title: The Halliday Brand
programme.desc: A western about a young man's (Joseph Cotten) disillusionment with his father (Ward Bond), a corrupt sheriff. When his dad turns away from the lynching of his sister's lover, the boy rebels and his father declares him an 'outlaw.'

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: King Creole
programme.desc: Elvis Presley gives Bourbon Street a new beat in King Creole. He plays a troubled youth whose singing sets the French Quarter rockin’.

programme.title: Fun in Acapulco
programme.desc: Elvis heads south of the border, where he’s fired as a boat hand, hired as a lifeguard and singer, admired by local beauties and inspired to jump off a 136-foot cliff. Put another way: he overcomes a fear of heights in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: A Night To Remember
programme.desc: On her maiden voyage in April 1912, the supposedly unsinkable RMS Titanic strikes an iceberg in the Atlantic Ocean.

programme.title: Lilies Of The Field
programme.desc: Nominated for 5 Academy Awards® including Best Picture and winner of the Best Actor Oscar® for Sidney Poitier for his role as an itinerant handyman who stops to help five impoverished nuns and the small Arizona desert town in which they reside.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: In Stanley Kramer's cinema classic, screen legends Sidney Poitier and Tony Curtis star as two convicts on the run from a Southern work gang who are bound together by an unbreakable iron chain and separated by an unbridled hatred for each other.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sidney Poitier and Rod Steiger (who won a Best Actor Oscar® for his performance) shine in this classic mystery-thriller that took home five Academy Awards®, including Best Picture and Best Adapted Screenplay. Lee Grant and Warren Oates also star.

programme.title: Two For The Seesaw
programme.desc: Robert Wise directs Robert Mitchum and Shirley MacLaine in this spicy and poignant love story about a free-spirited Greenwich Village girl who hooks up with a brooding Nebraska lawyer.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Edith develops laryngitis on the eve of her singing debut at Stephanie's PTA recital, Archie steps in to understudy the duet.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith is arrested for passing phony $10 bills she got from Archie's Place.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: After Mike and Gloria cancel their trip home for Christmas, the Bunkers decide to travel west for the holidays.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's mother pays a rare visit, transforming Maude into a quivering mass of guilt and insecurity. Wanting her mother to approve of Walter, whom she has never met, Maude over-reacts, putting the entire household into a state of hysteria.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude breaks the news that she's been asked to run for the State Senate, everyone is happy and proud, but Walter, who fears her political life would ruin their marriage.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude decides to run for the State Senate, Walter decides to run to the nearest swinging-singles bachelor pad -- it looks like Maude may have struck out for the fourth time in the marital sweepstakes.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Walter's separation is on a collision course as each shows up at the Harmons' anniversary party with a 'date.' Broadway musical-comedy star Bernadette Peters guest stars as Kathy Rivers, Walter's date for the party.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude decides her marriage is over -- Walter has fallen off the wagon and was seen by her in a compromising situation. Then Walter comes home with hopes of patching things up only to find Maude herself in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: It's Maude's moment of truth. After a long campaign for the State Senate and an equally tough campaign to save her marriage, it's election day in Tuckahoe.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: Después de ser admitido en el hospital con una hemorragia inexplicable, Chad Shelton de 11 meses llega a fallecer. Los investigadores y científicos buscan desesperadamente una causa cuando otros de la misma casa se enferman.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las primeras horas de la mañana, justo antes de Navidad, una estudiante universitaria fue secuestrada del estacionamiento de su departamento. Su cuerpo fue encontrado más tarde ese día. Ella había sido agredida sexualmente y fue disparada a quemarropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer muere mientras paseaba a sus perros por el bosque. Como no tenía enemigos y su marido tiene una coartada, la policía asume que fue un accidente de caza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de un rico empresario estadounidense fue encontrado en su auto de alquiler. Los dientes y fragmentos de huesos fueron los únicos restos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Raspando la Superficie
programme.desc: Los científicos forenses trabajan con la única pista recuperada de un tiroteo con múltiples víctimas: una escopeta de calibre 12. Los científicos utilizan métodos únicos para extraer el número de serie del arma y rastrearlo hasta su propietario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs

programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, who already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and now he's facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog -- the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class, her husband found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home. Further investigation reveals evidence of murder in the kitchen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, construction manager Darrell North was found dead in his work trailer in Ft. Worth, Texas. When investigators arrived, they found that he had been stabbed 46 times, indicating a personal relationship between the victim and the attacker.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to take part in the fund-raising campaign of the Westport Historical Society and offers to get her husband and his band to perform for their kickoff function. There's only one hitch – Ricky refuses to do it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy dreams of a night in New York City after spending six whole weeks in their new Connecticut home and it turns into a nightmare. Carefully hoarded tickets to a Broadway musical are supposed to take the Ricardos and the Mertzes to see the sold-out show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel is jealous of Lucy's friendship with neighbor Betty Ramsey. Sensitive to this, Lucy decides that the three of them should have a nice lunch together. Although reticent at first, Ethel opens up to Betty upon hearing they are both from Albuquerque.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy must get vacationing Ricky out of her hair so she can do her housework. She and Ethel trick their husbands into building a brick barbecue on the Ricardo patio by first pretending to build it themselves.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis become entangled in the Russian mafia while investigating two murders with a speechless child as the only witness.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy must link jailed Russian mob suspects to money laundering and murder before their release on technicalities.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy aims to prosecute both the suspect and the gun manufacturer after a shooting spree in Central Park kills 15 people.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives suspect a 10-year-old girl is responsible for the death of a boy at a construction site.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A judge maintains her husband's innocence after a botched murder attempt leaves her mortally wounded.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy opposes his former colleague, Jamie Ross, in the murder of another attorney for which a man may be wrongly convicted.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Even with key DNA evidence, a new witness jeopardizes the conviction of a man suspected of bludgeoning a woman into a coma.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think a life insurance salesman's valuable information about his policies was a motive for his murder.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a teenager is found murdered, Detectives Briscoe and Green suspect a school bully who displays an avid interest in martial-arts weapons.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A mentally disturbed suspect refuses to take his antidepressant medicine, rendering him incapable of standing trial for murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The parents of a missing child accuse each other of having the baby until a gruesome discovery is made.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green believe a possible love triangle was the motive behind the attempted assassination of a best-selling author.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives continue searching for a shooter who may be responsible for several unsolved murders years earlier.

programme.title: David Bowie: Stardust
programme.desc: 'The Rise and Fall of Ziggy Stardust and the Spiders from Mars' is arguably the most influential albums in the mind-blowing career of David Bowie.

programme.title: David Bowie: On the Rock Trail
programme.desc: Some say that youth is wasted on the young, but this could never be said of Rock icon David Bowie. His distinctive music, exotic appearance and wild boy lifestyle defined an entire generation through the glamorous, hedonistic 1970s.

programme.title: David Bowie: Out of This World
programme.desc: Few artists marked the 20th century like David Bowie did. He was an astonishing and eclectic performer. He was a true artist in every sense of the word. Infinitely changeable and unpredictable, he remains immortal in the people's heart.

programme.title: David Bowie: The Man Who Stole the World
programme.desc: Today the world mourns one of the most iconic musical heroes, David Bowie. With the news of his passing flooding newspaper headlines and millions of fans paying tribute to him on social media, his departure has left a mark on many all over the world.

programme.title: Elvis Home Movies
programme.desc: This film features what is believed to be the oldest known home movie footage of Elvis Presley to date.

programme.title: The Beatles Explosion
programme.desc: See the early days of the Beatles with rare interviews, newsreels, press conferences, and television appearances.

programme.title: Elvis: The Early Years Vol. 1
programme.desc: A chronicle of the life of Elvis Presley, from his humble beginnings to his rise to international stardom.

programme.title: Elvis: Part Two
programme.desc: A chronicle of the life of Elvis Presley, from his humble beginnings to his rise to international stardom.

programme.title: Fleetwood Mac: Unbroken Chain (12004)
programme.desc: Fleetwood Mac: Unbroken Chain tells the complete story of this amazing group through interviews, film clips, and rare photographs, from the band's early days as a British Blues powerhouse, to its rebirth as a worldwide phenomenon.

programme.title: Freddie Mercury: The King of Queen
programme.desc: Renowned as one of the greatest performers of the 20th century Freddie Mercury pushed the boundaries of art and music as he lead his band Queen to international stardom.

programme.title: The A-List: Dallas

programme.title: The A-List: Dallas
programme.desc: Looks like Levi has got his hands full yet again. Combine a needy new boyfriend, an upcoming rodeo competition and Ashley's new charity - it's a wonder he has any free time at all! Will Chase be able to rope Levi into a full-time relationship?

programme.title: The A-List: Dallas

programme.title: The A-List: Dallas

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Amara confronts the allegations that her manager, Jullian, stole money from Trina head on. Trina decides to pursue an all girls tour. Trick asks Trina to consider his woman for the tour. Joseline Hernandez lands in Miami.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Trina confronts her ex business partner Jullian about her album situation. Emjay pushes Amara to have kids. Joseline tries to stay out of the Miami drama and focus on music. A welcome home party for Brisco goes left.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Amara makes a shocking decision about her manager, Jullian. Miami Tip tries to calm the escalating drama between Sukihana and Nikki Natural. Joseline decides she can't let Premadonna back into Miami without a welcome home gift.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Amara makes a drastic choice about her relationship with Jullian. Joy sets Trick up on a blind date. Trina organizes a bootcamp for the girls tour but everything goes left when Nikki Natural arrives.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Trina's bootcamp ends in chaos. PreMadonna decides to take the high road in getting revenge on Joseline. Amara reaches out to old friends. Brisco attempts to make up for lost time. A night out ends behind bars for Trick Daddy.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Trina and Joy plan an intervention for Trick in the aftermath of his arrest. Amara gets ready for her first major concert without management from Jullian. Sukihana, Hoodbrat and crew decide to go on tour without Trina.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: The newly minted BAPS tour searches for a road manager. Trina and Joy convince Trick to sweat it out. An argument between Miami Tip and Saucy Santana puts Sukihana in the middle. Premadonna gets some information about Amara's man from an old friend.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Amara learns some troubling information about Emjay. Trina and Joy plan a family trip to honor Trina's late mother.The girls head out for their first spot date on the forthcoming BAPs tour.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Trina heads back to her hometown of the Bahamas to celebrate her late mother's birthday. A relaxing spa date for Amara ends in drama as she and Shay reach a boiling point over Emjay. Hood Brat uncovers some disturbing information about her boyfriend.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Sukihana holds a brunch to discuss the issue of colorism, but tensions between Amara and Premadonna serve as a distraction. Trick, Joy, and Bobby join Trina in the Bahamas as they all celebrate Trina's mother. Trick and Joy revisit their relationship

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Trick and Joy consider rekindling their romantic relationship. Suki's children visit from Atlanta. Trick and Trina throw a party to celebrate the launch of their radio show, but tensions between Amara and Premadonna threaten to wreck the event.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Trina hits the gas on her career. Ace Hood reconnects with his difficult past. Sukihana clashes with management. N.O.R.E. faces big changes at home.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Amara pursues a new passion in the Dominican Republic. Trina struggles before a high-stakes concert. Ace and Shelah host a tense Mother's Day brunch. Sukihana brings Bill to a meeting with her momager.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Amara makes a choice about her future. Florence is betrayed by those closest to her. Ray J. and Princess shake up N.O.R.E. and Neri. Shelah grapples with trauma and anxiety.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The World Crime Prevention Devices Association has developed the "killer safe" that sent many safe crackers to their graves. But Lupin takes the challenge to steal what it guards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin crashes crime boss Markane's masquerade party, but the party was just a ruse to entrap Lupin. Lupin gets hung by rope in the dark and is made the target of Markane's murder game in ten rounds, of which players have to hit the target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin gets called out to New York where he rescues a girl hunted by an organization called Red Spider. Lupin does everything he can to help the poor girl suffering from amnesia; he tries hypnosis on her but to no avail, he gets hypnotized instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Old man Piccolo had taught Lupin the art of thievery 15 years ago. Learning that his widowed wife had all of her belongings impounded by the police, Lupin promises her to get them all back.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew sneak into Peking's Imperial Palace Museum to steal Emperor Shi's jade Mahjong set, but winds up getting chased by a gang.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Look who is flying above New York; it's Superman! All he does is fly around, but the town is in a panic because of his performance. In the meantime, a lot of banks get robbed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin steals a statue called the Stone Child from the Metropolitan Art Museum; he and Fujiko make their getaway in a Cessna, but they crash at the Bermuda Triangle. They encounter a ghost ship at this grave of many ships and planes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Foodie and gourmet aficionado Baron Gourmel says he wants to eat Lupin's brain. He claims he'd offer his own 70-million dollar jewelry collection to anyone who could capture Lupin. Fujiko hears of it and informs Lupin right away.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin III learns that his grandfather Arsène Lupin's secret treasures are buried in his grave. Lupin learns of its location with Fujiko's microfilm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are surrounded, as usual, as they are trying to escape after a jewelry theft. But somebody shoots at Zenigata and hits him dead on. Lupin learns of the even the next morning in the papers, and Fujiko and Goemon get implicated.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of the Duchy of Blanco has a one-of-a-kind gold coin of Hannibal hidden in his chest; well, Lupin and crew are after it. Amidst their scheming, Jigen is challenged to a duel with a man named Stoneman.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of France has run up a ridiculous tab with Maxim of Paris, and orders the Louvre Museum proprietor to sell a painting to cover his bill. But the proprietor doesn't want to let it go, and takes the painting out of the museum.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin recieves a letter about Marie Antoinette's jeweled crown, and sneaks into the palace of Versailles. A young man called Oscar appears, the sender of the letter.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin was told by Fujiko to steal a pistol of the Wilhem family worth 500 million pounds. Meanwhile, a man named Jim Benkei, a giant of a man who's stirred troubled in London, steals Jigen's favorite Magnum ...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the various jewels at the World Fair in Los Angeles. Lupin learns from Fujiko that a man named Harry Satler is also after the jewels, so he decides to go see who this guy is. The man he meets is a wizened old man…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Pestered by Fujiko, Lupin has to steal a golden bed that was originally made by Louis XIV for Josephine. He makes a plan with Jigen and Goemon, but the owner of the bed, Morgan, is a formidable opponent who has WWII military experience.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Heike Clan and Minamoto Clan once battled on Devil's Head Island at the inland sea of Seto; Fujiko and Lupin go there to find out about the details behind the legend of the battle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vivian dreams of becoming a star some day, but her auditions are a bust. She thinks of using Lupin to become famous; she makes Lupin engage in thievery, and informs reporters to be at the site to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Louis XIV and Marie Antoinette's Hope Diamond has brought much misfortune on its possessors. The diamond is now safeguarded by a maximum security device. Fujiko provokes Lupin to steal that diamond.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew go to a hot spring. Lupin and Jigen relax while Goemon trains at the cliffs. A girl manifests to Goemon and captures Goemon's heart. However, the girl is seeking the secret of his sword, for her swordsmith grandfather…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has to battle a hitman called Tiger. Lupin tries to dodge him, but Tiger is one step ahead of him. Lupin keeps trying to escape him but Tiger is relentless; he has a way of disappearing and appearing at will.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends go to have fun at the horse race track, but winning isn't as easy as stealing. Lupin notices two people who are winning big money hand over fist, and gets suspicious.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Catherine rescues Lupin and Jigen, who are pursued by Zenigata as usual. She's an old acquaintance of Jigen's, and provokes Jigen to steal a 140-karat diamond from her own mansion.

programme.title: MST3K: Viking Women And The Sea Serpent
programme.desc: The crew watches an educational short about the wonders a home economics major can do for young women in The Home Economics Story (1951). In The Saga of the Viking Women Sea Serpent (1957), lonely Viking women set sail to rescue a group of enslaved men.

programme.desc: Our intrepid hosts are trapped between Isaac Asimov's Literary Doomsday Device and Robert Ito from Quincy M.E. (1976) in a fur caveman outfit.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Blood Waters of Dr. Z
programme.desc: Seeking revenge against those responsible for stripping him of his tenure and the denial of human research subjects, Dr. Z mutates himself into a hideous — and murderous — half-human-half-fish-like creature!

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Cave Dwellers
programme.desc: Wise ruler Akronas (aka “The Great One”) is the keeper of an incredibly powerful but potentially deadly device.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: City Limits
programme.desc: Set in the future, a teenage gang battles a corporation for control of an abandoned city in City Limits (1984). Crow sings a song devoted to Kim Cattrall and the guys try their hand at a City Limits trivia game.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato en bancarrota, bailan en la calle, pintan retratos de las personas y venden una manzana podrida a Cliff, el perro Grasoso. / Aparece un gorila en la casa de Perro y Gato justo cuando estaban saliendo al bowling.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están descansando en el jardín cuando se encuentran con Lola Caricola, que se muda al árbol que tienen en el jardín. / Perro y Gato trabajan como empresa de catering en una lujosa fiesta en una mansión de Nearburg.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: El automóvil de Perro y Gato se rompe y se ven obligados de llevarlo al taller de Lube. / Perro encuentra la vieja cámara de Gato y pasea por todo Nearburg tomando fotografías de personas en situaciones vergonzosas.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato se tropiezan con un plató de cine, y se convierten en dobles. / Perro y Gato convencen a Lola de infiltrarse entre los Grasosos para conocer sus hábitos y encontrar sus debilidades.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito se tropieza con los perros Groseros en la calle cantando Doo Wop. Los reúne con Perro y Gato y forman un grupo de canto para convertirse en súper estrellas. / Lola Caricola tiene que hacer un documental sobre Gato y Perro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Nearburg se convierte en tierra invernal y Perro y Gato, Lola, Dunglap, Mervis y los perros Grasosos aprovechan la oportunidad para pasear en trineo por la nieve. / Perro obtiene un equipo de hipnosis de juguete.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro construye su propio Camión de Monstruos y arrastra a Gato hasta la plaza de Nearburg para participar del Rally de camiones de monstruos. / Lola convence a Perro y Gato de producir miel en el jardín.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato pelean durante el almuerzo y continúan en la cocina, tiran harina, azúcar, chocolate y frutas por todo el lugar. / Perro y Gato heredan algunas tierras en la costa del hermoso lago Wanamaker, empacan sus cosas y se van.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato se transportan al año 3001 para luchar contra el malvado Gran Tito. / Lola vence a Gato por primera vez en la Convención de Inventos de Nearburg y lo que convierte a Gato en un enemigo envidioso.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Walt, el pavo del desfile de Acción de Gracias, aparece en la casa de Perro y Gato buscando refugio. Perro lo hace entrar y el hambriento Gato lo quiere devorar.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es la noche de Halloween y Gato, se disfraza como Duque Kahanamoku de Hawai y Perro, se disfraza como Conde Perrdrácula, salen en busca de dulces. Un vampiro peruano, Nosferacho, muerde a Perro y lo convierte en vampiro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro está entusiasmado porque hoy es el Día de Bromas Raras, la versión del Día de los Inocentes. / Perro y Gato se preparan para volver al reencuentro de la vieja escuela, en donde Gato quiere reavivar su romance con Sally.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es el Día Anual de los Padres y, como siempre, Gato y Perro quedan excluidos porque no tienen padres. Perro espera que este año sus padres finalmente aparezcan. Gato insiste en que la búsqueda es en vano.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La nave espacial en la que estaban Perro y Gato cae en un lago congelado donde un monstro del lago termina comiéndoselos como a un bocadillo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Una vez en el pueblo de Perros y Gatos, CatDog logran que todos los perros y gatos de la ciudad se enfrenten los unos a otros. Comienza una batalla en la cual Perro y Gato intentan interferir pero nada sale como lo esperaban.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Hace un año desde que el álter ego del súper héroe Perro el Poderoso salvó al Alcalde Rancio el Conejo de la Parca y ahora Nearburg está celebrando. / Los sobrinos de Tito vienen de visita.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están en la Convención de Fanáticos de Mean Bob, mirando una lucha de WWF entre Mean Bob y su enemigo Evil Eric. / Tito sale a caminar, y Gato y Perro aprovechan para entrar a su casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Este es el cuento de un viejo pescador sobre el pez espada que cuelga de la pared del living de Perro y Gato. / Gato sufre una crisis de identidad cuando una banda de gatos bohemios abre una tienda cerca de la casa de Perro y Gato.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Desde que era un cachorro, Perro siempre persiguió al camión de la basura, conocido como el viejo 159. / Perro tiene que ponerse un cono sobre su cabeza para protegerse de las picaduras de garrapatas en la oreja.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre hermanos se descontrola cuando Papá y Mamá vienen a visitar a Perro y Gato. / Perro realmente tiene un problema cuando descubre que su fuente de alimentación preferida proviene de animales.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es el día de recoger la basura y Perro no resiste su instinto natural de correr detrás del camión. / Perro quiere ir a Taco Depot, pero lo tienen prohibido.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro corre a la playa y termina contrayendo pulgas. La cura es usar una correa correctiva pero Gato se rehúsa. / Perro se come toda la comida de Gato en un grupo de enfoque de comida, llevando a la creación de comida para Catdog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es noche de luna llena y los instintos de Perro están sumamente disparados por lo que intenta resistir la tentación de correr con el grupo salvaje. / Gato comienza a etiquetar sus pertenencias para evitar que Perro las destruya.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato comienza a entrenar para a enfrentarse a Los Grasosos después de que le quitaran su disco volador. / Perro se vuelve apegado a un muñeco de juguete y decide llamarlo Pequeño Gato.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock's illness threatens to sabotage Luffy's rescue mission. However, the Snake Princess just can't say "no" to the rubber-man, so a plan to save Ace is quickly hatched.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy races to save Ace, Nami tries to survive life on Sky Island, and Franky dances up a snowstorm before making the switch from cola to tea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper narrowly avoids being served for dinner in a land inhabited by giant birds, and Sanji's refined tastes land him a role as a leading lady on the island of girlish hearts.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico Robin finds herself trapped on the island of Tequila Wolf: a miserable land where children are forced to work as slaves. Elsewhere, Usopp tries to survive a run-in with a man-eating plant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is held against his will by the pink-haired princess of bad vibes, Brook gets mistaken for the king of darkness, and Luffy continues to eat his way toward a reunion with Fire-Fist Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Boa arrive at Impel Down, but only thirty-three hours remain until Ace's execution. To save him, the Snake Princess must find a way to hide Luffy during her full-body search!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Time is running out on Ace, so Luffy teams up with a scoundrel who's going to pieces trying to escape Impel Down. There's no love lost between the former foes, but they'd better work together if they want to survive.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must part ways with a priceless treasure map before Buggy the Clown agrees to lead him through the bloody tangle of Blade Trees and Spike Needle Grass that make up Impel Down's Crimson Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Buggy the Clown could end up as hippo food if they aren't careful in Impel Down's Wild Beast Hell. Of course, the rubber-man might find that a better fate than dealing with the prison's putrid warden!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stumble upon a most peculiar village when they hitch a ride on a fire-breathing beetle. The natives are petrified of pirates, but they welcome the Straw Hats with open arms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The citizens of Little East Blue throw in a feast in honor of the Straw Hats, but when the Amigo Pirates try to capture Boss the Beetle, Luffy and his crew will have to defend their new friends.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji prepare to do battle on behalf of Boss the Beetle, but Captain Largo of the Amigo Pirates counters with a deadly arsenal of nets to put the Straw Hat brawlers on lock down!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks into Second Gear for his rematch with Largo, and Nami leads the islanders as they lay waste to the Amigo Pirates. Boss the Beetle may be safe for now, but someone sinister lurks behind the scenes.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to stay a step ahead of a prison patrol made up of hungry lions and poisonous scorpions! Meanwhile, Ace spends what could be his final hours swapping stories with a pirate who hates pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the guards struggle to squelch a violent prison uprising, Luffy and his fellow fugitives try to keep their cool in a level of Impel Down known as Starvation Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock uses her ample assets to buy some private time for a clandestine chat with Ace. Meanwhile, Luffy needs help from a graceful friend to escape the jaws of a hungry Sphinx!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Bon are on the verge of reaching Level 4, but they didn't count on fighting a demonic, lightning-fast, devastatingly powerful Minotaur! To defeat this beast, they'll need help from a human candle and a deranged clown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy narrowly avoids a deadly dip in the boiling pool of blood, only to find himself face to face with Warden Magellan. Meanwhile, outside the prison walls, the marine fleet prepares for Whitebeard's onslaught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Warden Magellan is a monster of a man with a penchant for poisoning prisoners. To rescue Ace, Luffy must go toe to toe with this toxic terror, but how do you defeat a foe who's deadly to the touch?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's daring assault on the venomous warden of Impel Down leaves him struggling to stand up, but despite the lethal poison breaking down his body, the rubber-man kicks his rescue mission into Second Gear!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy hovers perilously on the verge of death, Bon Clay embarks on a suicidal rescue mission plagued by sub-zero temperatures and bloodthirsty wolves with a supremely savage disposition!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: No existing antidote can save Luffy from the poison coursing through his veins, yet Bon Clay refuses to give up. His final, fleeting hope is a mysterious miracle-worker rumored to have vanished into the Gates of Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bon is overjoyed to hear that Luffy is still alive, but his happiness quickly turns to shock when he learns that Ivan's agonizingly painful "Healing Hormones" will cost the rubber-man ten years of his life!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is scheduled to be executed in a matter of hours, and Luffy's still hovering on the verge of death. It will take a miracle to save them both, but Bon would rather die than give up on his friend!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy miraculously survived his brush with death, but he's far too weak to finish rescuing Ace. Ivan is reluctant to lend a hormonal hand to the doomed rescue mission – until he learns of Luffy's lineage!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The quest to rescue Ace tuckers out thanks to a blast of sleeping gas! Ivan's scissor-handed sidekick puts an end to nap time, but Luffy will have to join forces with a scar-faced foe from the past if he wants to complete his mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's desperate attempt to rescue Ace is bolstered by two powerful new allies: the murderous Crocodile and the honorable fishman Jinbei. Meanwhile, Ivan sparks a prison riot to create a diversion for the rubber-man.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Dinner With Dana
programme.desc: Things heat up between Johnny Smith and Dana Bright, the news reporter who's been hounding him since he woke up, during a pretend date she plans to use as the basis for a cover story.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Shaman
programme.desc: Johnny Smith's visions reach across time when he joins forces with a psychic Native American Shaman from centuries past to avert a major disaster.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash goes on the hunt for his beloved Delta, but becomes the hunted.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Deadites are no match for our hero, but the Sheriff is, when Ash is brought up on charges.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: An angry mob corners Ash and the team in Brock's house while Ruby tries to summon the spell to send Baal back to hell.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash wakes up in an asylum and a seemingly helpful doctor tries desperately to get him to admit his horrific acts so his healing can begin.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Henry tries to determine why a seemingly docile domesticated abnormal suddenly turned violent after it attacks a research scientist.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will tries to defend Magnus from the heads of the Sanctuary Network when they accuse her of committing a shocking murder.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While carrying an abnormal, Will and Magnus' helicopter crashes on a decommissioned oil rig.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Helen reunites with Jimmy who transports an elemental Abnormal to the Sanctuary. However, they are tracked down by the underground Mobsters. Kate proves her loyalty and bonds with Jimmy over a common history they share.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and Will investigate the disappearances of teenagers with links to them spending time at a rehab clinic in Mexico. Magnus and Will are shocked to see Nikola Tesla as the program director. Tesla reveals the treatment he has been using on the teen...

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus and the team rescue a sinking ship near South Africa. Later at the Sanctuary, one of the passengers of the rescued ship is murdered, with Druitt as the prime suspect.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Da'an (Leni Parker) saves Lili's (Lisa Howard) life after a shuttle crash caused by a computer virus which threatens the Taelon's entire existence on Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: When the Taelons mastermind the sale of an illicit weapon to trap resistance leader Jonathan Doors (David Hemblen), Lili's estranged father (Doug Lennox) is part of the scheme.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: William Boone (Kevin Kilner) and Agent Sandoval (Von Flores) defend the Taelon scientist Rho-ha (Kari Matchett), who is ordered to stand trial for murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mom does all she can to provide for her kids, including taking up with five sugar daddies to make ends meet, but when jealousy rears its ugly head, this mom winds up dead and her killer is not who you would expect.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: To keep their marriage fresh, a young couple turns to a life of sex games and sharing spouses, but when threesomes and foursomes lead to murder, investigators struggle to prove who killed this swinger.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A lover's quarrel and a quick cash scheme lead to the murder of a happy retiree; the Hollywood community is stunned when a body is found under its most famous landmark.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother becomes a murder victim while living a double life; a web of deception, sex and murder sends detectives on a multi-year hunt to figure out who could have murdered her.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A high-speed car chase ends with a 40-year-old newlywed shot dead in front of her husband and stepdaughter; is this a robbery gone wrong, a gang ordered hit, or something more sinister.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The quintessential girl next door is discovered brutally killed on Thanksgiving weekend; it would take investigators over a year to uncover the dark obsession that led to her murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A foursome, a stripper, and a biker, is just the beginning for investigators of this massage table homicide; everyone is shocked as a secret fetish for murder is revealed.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found shot and stabbed in her kitchen; multiple suspects emerge, but the true mastermind of this murder hits closer to home than anyone expected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What started as a perfect marriage evolves into a threesome; after one of the participants winds up dead, the killer turns out to be someone the investigators never suspected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a psychic and her adult daughter are found killed under bizarre circumstances, the list of suspects grows long as investigators discover that male escorts, blackmail, fraud and love spells all played a part in this chilling double murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A mom starts online dating to try and cope after an unexpected tragedy, but when she gets pulled into the underbelly of the BDSM world and then disappears, investigators spend over a year unraveling this dark mystery.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A loving grandmother from a traveling community is found brutally murdered, shocking all; investigators soon uncover a web of lies, identity theft and millions in insurance fraud that point to who killed this sweet old lady.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a man is shot dead in bed right next to his fiancée, detectives learn that anyone's past can come back to haunt them.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young mother is brutally murdered but despite unique evidence at the scene, it takes years to put the pieces together and bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A wealthy entrepreneur is shot in his home; there are many suspects but with only suspicion to go on, it takes investigators over seven years to nab his killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Lust and greed are at the core of the case of a wife and mother who is found dead in her pool; investigators are quick to uncover a web of affairs, lies and fraud that lead them to her killer.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Falls in Love, Part 1

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Falls in Love, Part 2
programme.desc: Yukako’s dangerous obsession with reshaping Koichi into a man fit for her gets worse, prompting Koichi to hatch an escape plan. He tries to call Josuke for help using a nearby pay phone but is stopped by Yukako, who anticipated his move.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let’s Go Eat Some Italian Food
programme.desc: Josuke and Okuyasu come across an Italian restaurant owned by an Italian chef named Tonio. When Okuyasu asks for the menu, Tonio explains that he decides the menu on the spot based on the customer he sees.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Chili Pepper, Part 1

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Addams Family
